purpose: Explicit public-launch manifest for root HTML pages built by Vite. A root *.html file ships only after it is listed here with publicLaunchIntent.

pages.publicLaunchIntent: Primary Sundog public website entry point.
Public lab positioning, philosophy, origin bridge, and claim boundaries.
Public alignment and Bayes comparator primer defining route fidelity, same-information baselines, and current claim-hygiene ledger.
Public gallery of application surfaces and evidence tiers.
Public Balance workbench interface.
Public Ask Sundog claim-boundary experiment page.
Public h-of-x math workbench: plain first-equation demo for the promoted parhelion-offset inverse and its eligibility boundary.
Public geometry workbench shelf: cap-set primer, halo/h-of-x routing, and bounded apparatus framing for discrete-geometry discoveries.
Public vocabulary legend/reference page for halo terms and site terms; distinct from the visual Halo Atlas.
Public Mesa operating-envelope and traceability page.
Public Pressure Mines workbench interface.
Public origin and provenance story.
Public human and agent navigation map for evidence pages, docs, workbenches, and source context.
Public paper-theme design primitive demo linked from docs.
Public structural-failure boundary-map page: frozen falsifier, closed-form regime-separability, rendered Cut-3 held.
Legacy public alias that redirects /atlas or /atlas.html to the canonical visual Halo Atlas at /sundog.
Canonical public Sundog geometry and visual Halo Atlas page; distinct from the vocabulary Legend.
Public Sundog workbench interface.
Public Three-Body workbench interface.
Public cap-set workbench: interactive F_3^n exploration framing the 2016 polynomial-method breakthrough as a precedent for the 2026 unit-distance disproof.
